texto: Truly, learning appears to be a reverse geometric progression with experiences at one hour, one day, one month or one year dramatically more influential and formative than later experiences. As has often been quoted, 85% of brain development takes place by age 3, and yet we spend only 4% of our educational dollars by that point.
explicacao: Orientação direta de George Kaiser sobre temas ligados a educacao. A afirmação “Truly, learning appears to be a reverse geometric progression with experiences at one hour, one d…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a educacao, learning, day, útil em momentos de dia-chuvoso e termino.
